name: Organic Carrots
description: Crunchy, sweet organic carrots freshly harvested from local farms. Rich in beta-carotene and perfect for salads, juices, or cooking.

name: Fresh Broccoli
description: Vibrant green broccoli florets packed with vitamins C and K. Ideal for stir-fries, steaming, or adding to pasta.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, washed and ready to eat. Perfect for salads, smoothies, and sautéing.

name: Red Bell Pepper
description: Sweet, juicy red bell peppers bursting with flavour. Great for grilling, stuffing, or eating raw.

name: Cherry Tomatoes
description: Plump, vine-ripened cherry tomatoes with an irresistible sweetness. Ideal for salads and snacking.

name: Sweet Potato
description: Naturally sweet, creamy sweet potatoes. Bake, roast, or mash them for a wholesome side dish.

name: Cucumber
description: Cool, crisp cucumbers freshly picked. A refreshing addition to salads, sandwiches, and raita.

name: Fresh Cauliflower
description: Snow-white cauliflower head with tight, compact florets. Versatile for curries, roasting, or cauliflower rice.

name: Green Peas
description: Sweet, plump green peas shelled and ready to cook. A delightful addition to pulao, curries, and soups.

name: Beetroot
description: Deep crimson beetroots bursting with earthy sweetness. Excellent for juicing, salads, and roasting.

name: Eggplant
description: Glossy purple eggplants perfect for baingan bharta, grilling, or stir-fries.

name: Fresh Mushrooms
description: Tender white button mushrooms with a mild, earthy flavour. Perfect for soups, pizzas, and sautés.

name: Potato
description: Versatile all-purpose potatoes. Boil, bake, fry, or mash – the king of vegetables in every kitchen.

name: Onion
description: Fresh golden onions – the flavour base of every great dish. Essential for curries, soups, and salads.

name: Garlic
description: Aromatic garlic bulbs to add depth and punch to your cooking. Freshly harvested with papery white skin.

name: Fresh Ginger
description: Zingy, aromatic fresh ginger root. A must-have for chai, stir-fries, and traditional remedies.

name: Green Cabbage
description: Crisp, round green cabbage perfect for coleslaw, stir-fries, and hearty soups.

name: Lettuce
description: Crisp iceberg lettuce for crunchy salads, wraps, and burger toppings. Freshly harvested.

name: Kale
description: Nutrient-packed curly kale – the superfood green. Perfect for smoothies, chips, and salads.

name: Green Beans
description: Tender, snappy green beans picked at peak freshness. Great for stir-fries, curries, and steaming.

name: Zucchini
description: Mild, versatile zucchini perfect for grilling, baking, spiralising, or adding to pasta.

name: Pumpkin
description: Sweet, golden pumpkin slices perfect for soups, halwa, curries, and roasting.

name: Okra (Lady Finger)
description: Fresh, tender okra pods ideal for bhindi masala, frying, or adding to curries.

name: Radish
description: Peppery, crunchy white radishes – great in salads, parathas, and pickles.

name: Sweet Corn
description: Juicy, golden sweet corn cobs. Grill, boil, or add kernels to salads and soups.

name: Asparagus
description: Elegant green asparagus spears. Roast, grill, or sauté for a gourmet side dish.

name: Green Capsicum
description: Fresh green capsicums with a mild, slightly bitter taste. Perfect for stuffing and stir-fries.

name: Spring Onion
description: Fresh spring onions with mild flavour. Great as garnish, in soups, noodles, and salads.

name: Bottle Gourd (Lauki)
description: Light, nutritious bottle gourd – a staple for healthy curries, juices, and kofta.

name: Methi (Fenugreek)
description: Aromatic fenugreek leaves with a distinctive bitter-sweet flavour. Essential for methi paratha and aloo methi.

name: Bitter Gourd (Karela)
description: Deeply ridged bitter gourds loaded with health benefits. Stuff, fry, or cook into a dry sabzi.

name: Turnip
description: Mild, slightly sweet turnips. Roast, mash, or add to stews for a comforting winter dish.

name: Alphonso Mango
description: Premium Ratnagiri Alphonso mangoes. Known for their sunshine yellow skin and incredibly sweet, non-fibrous pulp.

name: Red Delicious Apple
description: Crisp and juicy apples imported from Kinnaur. Perfect for a healthy snack or fruit salads.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: World-famous dum biryani with long-grain basmati rice, tender chicken, and aromatic spices. Served with Mirchi ka Salan.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Creamy tomato-based gravy with soft cottage cheese cubes, finished with fresh cream and kasuri methi.

name: Double Cheese Margherita
description: Classic Neapolitan style pizza with extra mozzarella, tangy tomato sauce, and fresh basil leaves.

name: Veg Whopper Burger
description: Flame-grilled plant-based patty with fresh onions, lettuce, tomatoes, and tangy gherkins.

name: Veg Manchurian & Fried Rice
description: Deep-fried vegetable balls in a spicy soy-ginger gravy, served with aromatic vegetable fried rice.

name: Cold Coffee with Ice Cream
description: Rich, frothy cold coffee topped with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream and chocolate drizzle.

name: Kiwi Fruit
description: Zesty green kiwis packed with vitamin C. Perfect for a refreshing snack or fruit salad.

name: Fresh Pomegranate
description: Premium red pomegranates with juicy, antioxidant-rich seeds. Great for juices or salads.

name: Tandoori Chicken (Half)
description: Classic tandoori chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, roasted in a clay oven.

name: Butter Naan
description: Soft and fluffy leavened bread baked in tandoor, topped with a generous amount of butter.

name: Chilli Paneer Dry
description: Indo-Chinese style cottage cheese cubes tossed with bell peppers and onions in a spicy sauce.

name: Veg Hakka Noodles
description: Classic stir-fried noodles with crisp vegetables and authentic Chinese seasonings.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownie with a crinkle top. Best served warm with ice cream.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: A refreshing blend of fresh lime juice, sugar/salt, and soda. The perfect summer cooler.

name: Organic Bananas
description: Sweet and energy-packed Robusta bananas. Perfect for a quick snack or smoothies.

name: Seedless Black Grapes
description: Sweet, juicy, and seedless black grapes. A perfect refreshing summer fruit.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Classic North Indian dish featuring tender chicken pieces in a rich, buttery tomato gravy.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Slow-cooked black lentils with cream and butter. A staple of Punjabi cuisine.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpeas served with fluffy, deep-fried leavened bread. A beloved street food.

name: Penne Arrabbiata
description: Pasta in a spicy tomato sauce with garlic and dried red chili peppers.

name: Chicken Hakka Noodles
description: Wok-tossed noodles with shredded chicken, vegetables, and savory Chinese sauces.

name: Veg Spring Rolls
description: Crispy fried rolls filled with seasoned vegetables. Served with sweet chili sauce.

name: Masala Chai
description: Aromatic spiced tea brewed with milk and a blend of ginger, cardamom, and cloves.

name: Oreo Milkshake
description: Thick and creamy milkshake blended with Oreo cookies and topped with whipped cream.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Spiced vegetable mash served with butter-toasted buns, onions, and lemon.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft, deep-fried milk dumplings soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup.

name: Crispy Samosa
description: Golden-brown pastry triangles filled with a spiced potato and pea mixture. Served with tangy tamarind chutney.

name: Veg Steamed Momos
description: Delicate steamed dumplings filled with finely chopped vegetables and herbs. Served with a spicy red chili dip.

name: Garlic Butter Naan
description: Soft, tandoor-baked flatbread infused with fresh garlic and brushed with melted butter.

name: Fresh Pineapple
description: Sweet and tangy tropical pineapple, harvested at peak ripeness. Great for snacking or desserts.

name: Watermelon
description: Large, hydrating watermelon with sweet red flesh. Perfect for a refreshing summer treat.

name: Mango Lassi
description: A creamy, smooth blend of ripe mangoes, thick yogurt, and a touch of cardamom.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Succulent cubes of paneer marinated in a spiced yogurt blend and grilled to perfection in a tandoor.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed with creamy Caesar dressing, crunchy croutons, and parmesan cheese.
